message.content:
@startuml
title <u>SOURCE's Class Diagram</u>

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "model" {
  package "data" {
    package "source" {

      abstract class Collector {
        +Collector()
        +getDatumLinkListByTree()
        +getEntityDescription()
        +getEntityName()
        +getQualifiers()
        +getReferences()
        +getSingleStatement()
        +getStatementList()
        +triggerLoad()
        +triggerSave()
      }

      class WebCollector {
        #loaded : Entities
        -gson : Gson
        -seen : ArrayList<Entities>
        +WebCollector()
        +getDatumLinkListByTree()
        +getEntityDescription()
        +getEntityName()
        +getQualifiers()
        +getReferences()
        +getSingleStatement()
        +getStatementList()
        +triggerLoad()
        +triggerSave()
        #getJson()
        -formatURL()
        -iterateSnaks()
        -tryGetQualifiers()
      }

      class LocalCollector {
        +LocalCollector()
        +triggerSave()
        #getJson()
      }

      class LocalRepository {
        -file : File
        +LocalRepository()
        +load()
        +save()
      }

      WebCollector --|> Collector
      LocalCollector --|> WebCollector

      Collector o-- LocalRepository : repository
    }
  }
}
@enduml
